audit_result.proof_trace: Missing bounds check before array access. Function assumes cell_proofs.len >= blobs.len * CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB but no validation exists at any call site (RPC, EL paths, block recovery). Proof fails because REST API and EL interfaces accept external/untrusted data without length validation.
audit_result.attack_scenario: Attacker sends REST API request to /eth/v2/beacon/blocks with N blobs but fewer than N * CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB proofs. Line 328 accesses cell_proofs[i * CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB + j] out of bounds, causing IndexDefect and beacon node crash (DoS).

PROP-57888860-pre-006.text: Proof slicing indices in cells_and_kzg_proofs_construction must always be within blobs_bundle.proofs bounds.
PROP-57888860-pre-006.assertion: forall blob_i: start == i * CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB AND end == (i+1) * CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB AND end <= len(blobs_bundle.proofs)
